features: Effective Protection Plus Care in a little can
description: Product Description Dove Purely Pampering Shea Butter and Warm Vanilla Body Lotion deeply moisturises and softens your skin thanks to its rich blend of nourishing cream with shea butter. Dove Purely Pampering Shea Butter and Warm Vanilla Body Lotion is suitable for all skin types. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Stearic Acid, Caprylic/capric Triglyceride, Dimethicone, Glycol Stearate, Peg-100 Stearate, Cyclopentasiloxane, Petrolatum, Acrylates/c10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Carbomer, Cetyl Alcohol, Disodium Edta, Glyceryl Stearate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Isomerized Linoleic Acid, Methylparaben, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Propylparaben, Stearamide Amp, Tocopheryl Acetate, Triethanolamine, Coumarin, Ci 77891 Safety Warning External usage only. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before use Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
